use_cases: Displaying user account or subscription status in SaaS applications
Showing order or shipping status in e-commerce platforms
Indicating deployment or build status in dev tools dashboards
Representing notification or alert states in notification systems
Marking feature availability or tier labels in product interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible status badge component with four style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built using class-variance-authority. Features rounded pill design with hover state transitions and focus ring accessibility support. Designed as a reusable atomic component for displaying status indicators, labels, and categorical information across various interface contexts.
